introSection: Log Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Gulliver's Kingdom in Matlock Bath, Derbyshire, England, UK. It opened in 1987.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a log theme.

fullText:
Log Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Gulliver's Kingdom in Matlock Bath, Derbyshire, England, UK. It opened in 1987.

The ride has a single helix.

Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train has a log theme.
